seed-db.template: Run the database seed script to populate sample CRM data
seed-db.description: Seed the database with sample customers, contacts, and deals

add-customer.template: Walk through creating a new customer. Ask me for the company name, industry, website, phone, address, and any notes. Then insert into the database and show me the result.

review-crm.template:
Review the full codebase. Check for:
- Error handling gaps
- Missing input validation
- Route consistency
- Security concerns
- EJS template quality
- Prisma query efficiency

Provide a report with specific file:line references.
review-crm.description: Full codebase review for quality and security
